Personal knowledge repository

Main

A personal university knowledge repository of mathematics, physics, computer science, and the things between.

Section · 17 pages Master's Thesis Working notes, drafts, and references for the thesis.
Section · 7 pages Mathematics Articles and coursework, from algebra to differential geometry. Section · 13 pages Computer Science Algorithms, complexity, and systems. Section · 1 page Physics From relativity to quantum mechanics.
